data: Art market shows 23% recovery; Indian stocks adjust to new STT/taxation rules.
Indian markets face STT hike (Futures 0.05%, Options 0.15%) and new buyback tax rules today. Art market trends lean towards blue-chip and Middle East infrastructure.
Indian markets operating under new STT/buyback tax rules. Art market remains stable with blue-chip focus.
Indian markets impacted by April 1 tax/regulatory overhaul including STT hike and new IT Act 2025. Art market consolidates with focus on blue-chip and Middle Eastern cultural hubs.
